New Water Infrastructure Plan Announced

Published: 15 April 2024 | Source: Department of Water

The Department of Water today announced a new infrastructure investment plan worth $500 million to upgrade water treatment facilities across the state.

The Minister for Water, Jane Smith, said the investment will "improve water quality and security for over two million residents".

Key components of the plan include:

  • Upgrade of the Western Treatment Plant;
  • Construction of a new desalination pipeline; and
  • Replacement of ageing distribution mains in regional areas.

The plan is expected to be completed by 2028.

(Source: Department of Water)
